resolution_rules: Consensus of eval_1 and eval_2 with explicit resolution rules for disagreements

basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventories-merchandise $100, Cr Cash $100; semantically equivalent.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventories-merchandise $300, Cr Trade payables $300; exact match.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Both evals agree: Issued capital and Share premium are IFRS equivalents of Share capital-Common and APIC; amounts correct.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Both evals agree: Cost of sales equals COGS and Revenue from sale of goods equals Revenue-Product sales; all amounts match.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Trade payables $50, Cr Cash $50; exact match.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Long-term borrowings old/new is semantically equivalent to Notes payable debit/credit; amounts correct.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Both evals agree: Bank loan payable equivalent to Notes payable and Issued capital equivalent to Share capital-Common; amounts match.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Deferred income equivalent to Contract liabilities; Revenue from rendering of services correct; amounts match.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Both evals agree: Pipeline returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with null entry; expected Dr Treasury shares $200, Cr Cash $200.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Both evals agree: Dividends declared is the standard alternative to directly debiting Retained earnings for dividend declarations; per IFRS both are valid approaches.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Both evals agree: Preferred shares matches Share capital-Preferred and Issued capital matches Share capital-Common; amounts correct.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Both evals agree: Employee benefits expense is the IFRS umbrella term that includes salaries under IAS 19; amounts correct.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Utilities expense $50, Cr Accrued liabilities $50; exact match.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Both evals agree: Casualty loss and Inventories match expected; amounts correct at $2,000.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both evals agree: Both actual and expected are null; no journal entry for non-financial board resolution.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Both evals agree: Machinery equivalent to PP&E-Machinery; all three lines with correct amounts ($800K, $700K, $100K).

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Both evals agree: Machinery equivalent to PP&E-Machinery; correct capitalization of $200,000 overhaul cost.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Resolved: PV rounding ~$6 on $3M bond (under 0.01% of transaction amount); match accepted per rounding tolerance rule.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Both evals agree: Warranty provisions equivalent to Provision for warranties; expected value calculation of $900,000 is correct.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Resolved: Machinery vs PP&E-Marine structures are distinct accounts per resolution rules; generic Machinery is not an acceptable substitute for the specific marine asset sub-class.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Both evals agree: Issued capital matches Share capital; correct split of $50,000 par and $10,000 retained earnings; cash $60,000 correct.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Resolved: Transportation expense is a synonym for Distribution costs per resolution rules; all five lines and amounts correct.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Both evals agree: Prepaid expenses matches Prepayments; amount $1,000,000 correct.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Both evals agree: Actual records net PV only instead of gross face value with discount contra account as expected; wrong presentation method.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Resolved: Cash and cash equivalents used for both credits is an acceptable synonym for Cash and Cash-chequing per resolution rules; debit accounts and amounts correct.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Donations expense $1,000,000, Cr Notes payable $1,000,000; exact match.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Both evals agree: Motor vehicles equivalent to PP&E-Vehicles; Short-term borrowings equivalent to Notes payable; amounts correct.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $200,000, Cr Long-term borrowings $200,000; exact semantic match.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Cash and cash equivalents encompasses Cash-chequing; Contract liabilities matches; amount $5,000 correct.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Both evals agree: Office equipment and Motor vehicles are equivalent to PP&E sub-accounts; all four lines and amounts correct.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Revenue from rendering of services equivalent to Revenue-Service revenue; amount $25,500 correct.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Both evals agree: Trade receivables and Revenue from rendering of services match expected; amount $31,500 correct.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Both evals agree: R&D expense matches; Cash and cash equivalents equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount $50,000 correct.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Both evals agree: All six lines semantically match with correct amounts.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Resolved: Manufacturing overhead (expense) vs WIP (asset) are different account types per resolution rules; factory electricity should be product cost in WIP, not a period expense.

int_24_advertising.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Advertising expense $22,000, Cr Cash $22,000; exact match.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Both evals agree: Actual uses Trade payables for the deferred purchase installment instead of Other payables; classification difference.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Resolved: 4 withholding lines vs 1 aggregated is acceptable per granularity rule; totals match ($7,750 withholdings, net cash $37,250 correct).

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Resolved: 7 debit lines vs 2 simple is acceptable per granularity rule; totals match (liability debits $7,750, employer expense $6,300, cash $14,050).

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Advertising expense $7,000, Cr Cash $7,000; exact match.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Both evals agree: Tenant deposits payable equivalent to Rental deposits received; amount $25,000 correct.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Both evals agree: Short-term loans receivable matches; Cash equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount $2,000,000 correct.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Resolved: Trade payables vs Other payables for dealer financing is borderline acceptable per resolution rules; amounts and debit account correct.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Both evals agree: Correct derecognition treatment; amounts differ by only $0.16 rounding; accounts semantically equivalent.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Both evals agree: Correct collateralized borrowing treatment; minor $0.16 rounding difference; accounts match expected.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Both evals agree: Investments-FVTPL equivalent to Financial assets at FVTPL; Professional fees equivalent to Investment transaction costs; amounts correct.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Both evals agree: Investments-FVOCI equivalent to Financial assets at FVOCI; transaction costs correctly capitalized at $3,100,000.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Both evals agree: Investments-equity method equivalent to Investment in associate; transaction costs correctly capitalized at $3,100,000.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Both evals agree: Prepaid expenses equivalent to Prepaid rent; Cash and cash equivalents equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount $24,000 correct.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Resolved: Occupancy expense vs Rent expense are distinct account names per resolution rules.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Employee benefits expense $125, Cr Credit card payable $125; exact match.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Meeting expense $125, Cr Credit card payable $125; exact match.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Entertainment expense $125, Cr Credit card payable $125; exact match.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Resolved: eval2 confirms actual output is Dr Inventories-WIP $125, Cr Credit card payable $125, which is semantically equivalent to WIP-Manufacturing overhead.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Both evals agree: Tax split (HST/ITC extracted separately vs bundled) yields match=false, tax_relaxed_match=true.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Both evals agree: Tax split (HST/ITC extracted separately vs bundled) yields match=false, tax_relaxed_match=true.
